---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
datos <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2021_religion_population_pyramid.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 3
)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)

datos <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2021_religion_population_pyramid.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 3
)

datos_limpios <- datos %>%
  rename(
    edad_label = `Age Label`,
    sexo = `Sex Label`,
    religion = `Religion or Religion Brought Up In Label`,
    personas = Count
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    edad = parse_number(edad_label),
    personas = as.numeric(personas),
    
    sexo = case_when(
      str_to_lower(sexo) == "male" ~ "Male",
      str_to_lower(sexo) == "female" ~ "Female",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    religion = case_when(
      str_detect(religion, regex("Catholic", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Católica",
      str_detect(religion, regex("Protestant", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Protestante",
      str_detect(religion, regex("Other religions", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Otras religiones",
      str_detect(religion, regex("None|No religion", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Sin religión",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(edad),
    edad >= 0,
    edad <= 99,
    !is.na(sexo),
    !is.na(religion),
    !is.na(personas)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    personas_plot = if_else(sexo == "Male", -personas, personas)
  )
```

```{r}
datos_piramide <- datos_limpios %>%
  group_by(edad, sexo, religion) %>%
  summarise(
    personas = sum(personas),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    personas_plot = if_else(
      sexo == "Male",
      -personas,
      personas
    )
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  datos_piramide,
  aes(
    x = edad,
    y = personas_plot,
    fill = religion
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = abs
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Católica" = "#D7191C",
      "Protestante" = "#0077B6",
      "Otras religiones" = "#F0C400",
      "Sin religión" = "grey70"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "piramide_religion_irlanda_norte_2021.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```
